name: Maple Glazed Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the carrots and cut into sticks.
2. Pour the orange juice into a microwave-safe dish.
3. Heat for 1 minute on high.
4. Add the carrots and orange rind to the dish; stir to coat with juice.
5. Cover and microwave for 8-9 minutes on high, stirring after 4 minutes.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients (maple syrup, butter).
7. Microwave uncovered for an additional 2 minutes on high, stirring thoroughly.
8. Check for doneness; if needed, cook another minute on high.
